arts.ttl: Preview: Brest vs. Paris Saint-Germain - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Ligue 1 clash between Brest and Paris Saint-Germain, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Paris Saint-Germain transfer news: Xavi Simons joins RB Leipzig in €81m deal
arts.sum: RB Leipzig announce that they have reached an agreement with Paris Saint-Germain to sign Xavi Simons on a permanent transfer.
